key_risks: Soft CPI print on June 10 sparks growth/tech rally, leaving defensives behind SPY

Healthcare policy headline risk from MedPAC June report
Energy/oil spike feeds back into cyclicals outperforming defensives

Quality dividend tilt outperforming in choppy tape; defensive carry with reasonable valuation.

portfolio_rationale: Hot CPI/PPI prints, sticky core inflation, and a Fed on hold at 5.25-5.50% argue for defensive tilt heading into June FOMC and May CPI. Tech/growth showed sharp 7-day drawdowns; positioning in defensive quality, low-vol, healthcare and staples should outperform a likely volatile SPY tape.
rationale_summary: Defensive equity tilt (healthcare, dividend, low-vol, staples) plus aerospace/defense to navigate hot inflation prints and FOMC risk within the one-month window.
